title: chaetospermum glutinosum
intro: Chaetospermum glutinosum, also known as the "sticky seed tree," is a plant species in the family Rutaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Chaetospermum glutinosum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Chaetospermum glutinosum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
